preview.summary: Reigning world champions Argentina open Group J against an Algeria side that arrives in confident mood. Expect Lionel Scaloni's possession-based champions to dominate the ball while Algeria look to spring on the counter through their pacey forwards.
preview.homeForm: Defending champions and two-time reigning Copa America winners, Argentina sit among the world's top sides and are overwhelming tournament favorites.
preview.awayForm: Algeria cruised through CAF qualifying with four straight wins after one slip and warmed up by beating the Netherlands; they sit 28th in the FIFA rankings.
preview.homeKey: Lionel Messi, in a record sixth and likely final World Cup.
preview.awayKey: Riyad Mahrez, captain and creative leader with 38 international goals.
storylines: Messi opens what is expected to be his farewell World Cup
Mohamed Amoura, CAF qualifying's joint-top scorer, leads Algeria's attack
Luca Zidane, son of Zinedine, is in the Algeria squad
preview.h2h: The sides have met only at past World Cups in the 1960s, with Argentina winning their 1966 group meeting 2-0.
